summary: The release/0.7.1 program index is coherent with the single-worktree orchestration model and the repaired protected-policy acceptance contract: slices commit directly to feat/aws-ecs-program, Plan 12 tests one candidate whose task definitions and receipts are bound to the seven-setting manifest inventory, and release/0.7.1 moves only by the final exact-SHA fast-forward. Runtime GO remains exclusively gated by successful execution of Plan 12.

review_basis.head: c66231eb06df5a67421ff3649c7d561fdf3ac250
review_basis.process: Independent frozen-tree review after the Plan 10 protected-policy acceptance repair; exact task-definition and receipt bindings plus the shared five-case backend/frontend policy projection were revalidated without changing the prescribed orchestration sequence.

warnings.issue: Hosted CI does not yet exercise the lean INSTALL_EXTRAS Docker build path.
warnings.disposition: Accepted non-blocking strengthening follow-up; Plan 10 and Plan 12 execute the real lean build locally.

warnings.issue: S3 IfNoneMatch behavior is verified against botocore and fakes, not LocalStack or real S3.
warnings.disposition: Accepted non-blocking residual, explicitly recorded in Plan 07 and overview follow-up 9.

resolved_findings.resolution: Program, spec, graph, and closeout retargeted to release/0.7.1.
A 20-step dependency-gated Filigree milestone now owns 18 application slices, one verification-baseline task, and final closeout.
Plan 12 owns exact-version, local, hosted, trust-boundary, live AWS, evidence, rollback, and teardown gates.
Plan 10 now specifies executable rollout, rollback, signals, compatibility authority, Cognito preflight, acceptance harnesses, and cleanup.

verification: balanced Markdown code fences across plan/spec files
bash -n over every Plan 12 bash block
Ruff check and format-check of Plan 01 deployment_contract.py snippet
no executable bare-pytest commands remain in the AWS ECS plan set
live Filigree plan contains 20 steps, Plan 12 checks all 19 pre-closeout tracker steps, and Plan 10 is blocked by every preceding application slice
4654 backend tests and 2324 frontend tests pass with exact five-case policy projection parity

review_history.summary: Round 6 revalidated the overview after Plans 15A-15C, the universal-policy design, dependency repairs, and the 19-slice closeout inventory.
Initial release/0.7.1 review found four blockers and five warnings.
